items.title: ‘The Pitt’ Star Noah Wyle Was Offered Roles in ‘Saving Private Ryan’ and ‘Good Night, and Good Luck’ but ‘Couldn’t Get Out’ of Filming ‘ER’
items.summary: “The Pitt” star Noah Wyle recently told the “Still Here Hollywood” podcast that he missed out on roles in “Saving Private Ryan” and “Good Night, and Good Luck” because he couldn’t get out of filming the long-running medical series “ER.” When asked if he had any roles that got away, Wyle said, “Yeah, tons. items.title: Gurriers at The Button Factory, Dublin
items.summary: The post Gurriers at The Button Factory, Dublin appeared first on Goldenplec.com Gurriers at The Button Factory, Dublin on Friday December 19th, 2026 Gurriers, the last diamond to be forged from Ireland’s post-punk scene before the mine collapsed, played two sold-out shows in The Button Factory this week on a landmark occasion for a group who have outgrown their sweaty club origins.

items.title: Kingfishr at 3Arena, Dublin
items.summary: The post Kingfishr at 3Arena, Dublin appeared first on Goldenplec.com   Kingfishr at 3Arena, Dublin on December 18th 2025 One of the most anticipated concerts of the year occurred on an absolutely freezing Thursday night, with Kingfishr taking the stage of the 3arena for the first of their two sold out shows.

items.title: Shakira and FIFA Announce $500,000 for Venezuela Earthquake Relief
items.summary: The donation will be dedicated to support organizations in Venezuela helping children whose education has been disrupted . Shakira and FIFA Announce $500,000 for Venezuela Earthquake Relief Chris Coplan

items.title: Tom Cole Junior putting the zing back into swing with major gig in National Concert Hall
items.summary: Tom Cole Junior is performing at the National Concert Hall next week, with his unique style of swing combined with his distinctive vocal tones keeping alive the timeless evergreen songs from the golden age of swing

items.title: Dublin Airport's important message for sunflower lanyard users
items.summary: Dublin Airport has issued a reminder to passengers wearing the internationally recognised Sunflower lanyard, which helps those with hidden disabilities discreetly signal to staff that they may need extra time, patience or support while travelling
